title: AKC agent coordination spec (v1 schema id; spec_version 1–2)
description: JSON Schema for agent coordination artifacts. The file id remains v1 for backward compatibility. Use spec_version: 2 or coordination_spec_version: 2 for reserved edge kinds (parallel, barrier, delegate, handoff). When both spec_version and coordination_spec_version are present, they must be equal. Scheduling implementations: Python akc.coordination.models (parse_coordination_obj, CoordinationScheduler, schedule_coordination_layers), optional re-export akc.runtime.coordination.models; TypeScript src/akc/coordination/static/coordination_sdk.ts; CLI akc runtime coordination-plan. After lowering reserved kinds to precedence, multiple edges that share the same (src_step_id, dst_step_id) collapse to a single precedence arc for topological layering; schedule outputs may record merged provenance in lowered_precedence_edges. Normative rules for lowering, deduplication, determinism, and errors: docs/coordination-semantics.md.

spec_version.description: Coordination semantics version. v1: depends_on scheduling only. v2: reserved edge kinds are lowered to precedence (same schedule as equivalent depends_on graph). coordination_spec_version overrides when present only in parsers that read it; both fields must match if both set.

coordination_spec_version.description: Optional alias for spec_version (AKC parsers prefer this when present). Must match spec_version when both are set.

coordination_graph.description: Directed coordination graph. Scheduling semantics: step set, lowering, deduplication of (src_step_id, dst_step_id) precedence arcs, deterministic Kahn layers — docs/coordination-semantics.md.

kind.description: v1: depends_on. v2: depends_on | parallel | barrier | delegate | handoff (all v2 kinds lower to precedence for layer scheduling). Multiple edges with the same ordered pair (src_step_id, dst_step_id) merge to one precedence arc for layering. See docs/coordination-semantics.md.
